calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73271642 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73271642 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73271642 --event evt-petition-disposition\nfind data/cases/scotus/73271642 -maxdepth 10 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -A45 -B5 \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition|originating circuit|SCOTUS Term|2025 Term|state court\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 260\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary|by Term|by era|disposition\" metrics/statpack.md\nsed -n '1,220p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find metrics -maxdepth 2 -type f -print | sort\nrg -n \"modern|discretionary\" metrics","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json\njq '.. | objects | with_entries(select(.key | test(\"modern|discretionary\"; \"i\"))) | select(length > 0)' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 300\nsed -n '32,72p' metrics/README.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation 'Terry v. Ohio, 392 U.S. 1' --citation 'Florida v. J.L., 529 U.S. 266' --limit 8 --corpus-backend ranged 2>/tmp/fedcourts-query.stderr\nsed -n '1,80p' /tmp/fedcourts-query.stderr","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"Rodriguez-Montes",filed_before:"2026-04-30",fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","docketNumber","citation","snippet","absolute_url"],num_results:10}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="image") image(c); else if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\ntest ! -e data/cases/scotus/73271642/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z && echo target-absent || find data/cases/scotus/73271642/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260710T234542Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -print","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output)
